name: Aerilate
description: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

name: Aroma Veil
description: Protects allies from attacks that effect their mental state.

name: Aura Break
description: The effects of Aura Abilities are reversed.

name: Battery
description: Powers up ally Pokemon's special moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade ally special-power handler ported from PW2Code Battery.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Battle Bond
description: Defeating an opposing Pokemon strengthens the Pokemon's bond with its Trainer, and it becomes Ash-Greninja. Water Shuriken gets more powerful.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/BattleBond.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Beast Boost
description: Boosts the most proficient stat each time the Pokemon knocks out another Pokemon.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade KO stat-boost handler ported from PW2Code BeastBoost.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Berserk
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade HP-threshold stat-boost handler ported from PW2Code Berserk.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Bulletproof
description: Protects the Pokemon from some ball and bomb moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported with expanded high-bit move flag; message ID 210 still needs in-game verification.

name: Cheek Pouch
description: Restores HP as well when the Pokemon eats a Berry.

name: Comatose
description: The Pokemon is always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack without waking up.

defaultProgress.notes: White2Upgrade condition-fail, permanent-condition, Hex, and common status-reaction hooks ported from PW2Code BattleEngine.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Needs in-game verification.

name: Competitive
description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

name: Corrosion
description: The Pokemon can poison the target even if it is a Steel or Poison type.

defaultProgress.notes: White2Upgrade condition-fail hook ported from PW2Code BattleEngine.cpp so Corrosion bypasses native Poison/Steel poison immunity; builds in w2u_main.dll. Needs in-game verification.

name: Dancer
description: When another Pokemon uses a dance move, it can use a dance move following it regardless of Speed.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Dancer.cpp plus Dancer move follow-up hooks in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Dark Aura
description: Powers up each Pokemon's Dark-type moves.

name: Dazzling
description: Surprises opposing Pokemon, making them unable to attack using priority moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Mapped to the ported Queenly Majesty priority-block handler, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Disguise
description: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokemon can protect it from an attack.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Disguise.cpp plus form/status hooks in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Electric Surge
description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokemon enters battle.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/ElectricSurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Emergency Exit
description: The Pokemon switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

defaultProgress.notes: Partial White2Upgrade direct-damage Emergency Exit/Wimp Out behavior was manually verified, but PW2Code simple-damage/end-turn switch hook behavior is not yet ported; battleCode remains unchecked.

name: Fairy Aura
description: Powers up each Pokemon's Fairy-type moves.

name: Flower Veil
description: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokemon's stats.

name: Fluffy
description: Halves damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles damage taken from Fire-type moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade damage-ratio handler ported from PW2Code Fluffy.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Full Metal Body
description: Prevents other Pokemon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokemon's stats.

defaultProgress.notes: Mapped to the vanilla Clear Body handler through a White2Upgrade ability-event alias, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Fur Coat
description: Halves damage from physical moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

name: Gale Wings
description: Gives priority to Flying-type moves.

name: Galvanize
description: Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves, and the power of those moves is boosted a little.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade normal-move conversion handler ported by extending the existing -ate family path; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Gooey
description: Contact with the Pokemon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.

name: Grass Pelt
description: Boosts the Defense stat when the terrain is grass.

name: Grassy Surge
description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokemon enters battle.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/GrassySurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Innards Out
description: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by an amount equal to the Pokemon's last HP.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/InnardsOut.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Liquid Voice
description: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/LiquidVoice.cpp plus sound-move hooks in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Long Reach
description: The Pokemon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp contact hook; no standalone ability library.

name: Magician
description: The Pokemon steals the held item of a Pokemon it hits with a move.

name: Mega Launcher
description: Powers up aura and pulse moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported with expanded high-bit pulse flag; needs in-game verification.

name: Merciless
description: The Pokemon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade critical-check handler ported from PW2Code Merciless.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Misty Surge
description: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain when the Pokemon enters battle.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/MistySurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Parental Bond
description: Parent and child attack together.

name: Pixilate
description: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

name: Power Construct
description: Other Cells gather to aid when its HP becomes half or less, then the Pokemon changes its form to Complete Forme.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/PowerConstruct.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Power of Alchemy
description: The Pokemon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

defaultProgress.notes: Mapped to the ported Receiver handler, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Prism Armor
description: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks taken.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade supereffective damage-reduction handler ported from PW2Code PrismArmor.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Protean
description: Changes the Pokemon's type to the type of the move it just used.

name: Psychic Surge
description: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokemon enters battle.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/PsychicSurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Queenly Majesty
description: Its majesty pressures opposing Pokemon, making them unable to attack using priority moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade priority-block handler ported from PW2Code QueenlyMagesty.cpp; compatibility spelling preserved with a clean alias in code. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Receiver
description: The Pokemon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade fainted-ally ability-copy handler ported from PW2Code Receiver.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Refrigerate
description: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

name: RKS System
description: Changes the Pokemon's type to match the memory disc it holds.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code defines/list-checks ABIL_RKS_SYSTEM, but README says RKS System is not implemented; this likely needs a fresh Memory/Multitype-style implementation.

name: Schooling
description: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokemon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Schooling.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Shadow Shield
description: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokemon takes while its HP is full.

defaultProgress.notes: Mapped to the vanilla Multiscale handler through a White2Upgrade ability-event alias, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Shields Down
description: When its HP becomes half or less, the Pokemon's shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/ShieldsDown.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Slush Rush
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat in a hailstorm.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade speed-ratio handler ported from PW2Code SlushRush.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Soul-Heart
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Sp. Atk stat every time a Pokemon faints.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade faint-reaction stat-boost handler ported from PW2Code SoulHeart.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Stakeout
description: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched in.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Stakeout.cpp plus switch-in tracking in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Stamina
description: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported from PW2Code Stamina.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Stance Change
description: The Pokemon changes form depending on how it battles.

name: Steelworker
description: Powers up Steel-type moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade move-power handler ported from PW2Code Steelworker.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Strong Jaw
description: The Pokemon's strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported with expanded high-bit bite flag; needs in-game verification.

name: Surge Surfer
description: Doubles the Pokemon's Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade Electric Terrain speed-ratio handler ported from PW2Code SurgeSurfer.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Sweet Veil
description: Prevents ally Pokemon from falling asleep.

name: Symbiosis
description: The Pokemon can pass an item to an ally.

name: Tangling Hair
description: Contact with the Pokemon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.

defaultProgress.notes: Mapped to the existing Gooey contact Speed-drop handler, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Tough Claws
description: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported using FLAG_CONTACT fallback because MakesContact is not exported here; needs in-game verification.

name: Triage
description: Gives priority to healing moves.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Triage.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

name: Water Bubble
description: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokemon and prevents the Pokemon from getting a burn.

defaultProgress.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/BurnPrevention.cpp via EventAddWaterBubble; verify any Water Bubble damage multiplier hooks during port.

name: Water Compaction
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Defense stat sharply when hit by a Water-type move.

defaultProgress.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported from PW2Code WaterCompaction.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

name: Wimp Out
description: The Pokemon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

defaultProgress.notes: Partial White2Upgrade direct-damage Emergency Exit/Wimp Out behavior was manually verified, but PW2Code simple-damage/end-turn switch hook behavior is not yet ported; battleCode remains unchecked.
